svg.aria-label: Chat with OpenClaw: it generates the visual and schedules the posts through PostQueen
svg.text: your agent, on WhatsApp or Telegram
Make a post about Saturday's yoga workshop
with a nice visual, put it on Instagram and
On it! Generating the visual and scheduling
Sunrise flow: Saturday yoga workshop, 9 AM
They are on your calendar if you want to tweak anything first.
